stories.title: Woman, 20s, arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident in Co Monaghan
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

stories.title: Tour de France 2026: Richard Carapaz wins stage 18
stories.summary: Ecuador's Richard Carapaz won stage 18 of the Tour de France following a commanding breakaway. The EF Education-Easypost rider brilliantly accelerated away from his rivals with intuitive and canny riding, finishing 45 seconds ahead of Switzerland's Mauro Schmid of Jayco-Alula and Matteo Jorgenson of Visma-Lease a Bike. Meanwhile, sickness appears to be making its way through overall leader Tadej Pogacar's UAE Team Emirates-XRG squad after key domestique Brandon McNulty abandoned the race mid-stage.

stories.title: Judith Rakers filmt am Strand – und wird vom Vater ermahnt
stories.summary: "Weil die Nudisten dann Theater machen" Judith Rakers verärgert Vater mit Strand-Video 20.07.2026 Lesedauer: 2 Min. Moderatorin Judith Rakers hat ein Video vom Strand geteilt. Ihr Vater war mit der Aufnahme nicht einverstanden – und ermahnte sie vor laufender Kamera. Judith Rakers war mit ihrem Vater Hermann Rakers gemeinsam auf der Insel Rügen. In einem kurzen Instagram-Clip lässt die ehemalige "Tagesschau"-Sprecherin ihre Fans an einer lustigen Szene teilhaben: Die 50-Jährige wird von ihrem Vater vor laufender Kamera zurechtgewiesen. In dem Video geht Hermann Rakers auf einem Fußweg zum Strand, im Hintergrund sind Gebäude zu sehen. "Du darfst hier nicht fotografieren, Judith.

stories.title: Lotto e Superenalotto, l’estrazione di oggi 23 luglio: tutti i numeri vincenti
stories.summary: Introduzione Le estrazioni dei numeri dei giochi del Lotto, Superenalotto e 10eLotto si tengono ogni martedì, giovedì, venerdì e sabato. Per tentare la fortuna, è possibile giocare fino alle ore 19.30 del giorno del concorso. Le estrazioni dei numeri, poi, iniziano dalle ore 20. Ecco i numeri vincenti di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, l'ammontare del jackpot e i numeri ritardatari. Sceglici su: Quello che devi sapere Come funziona il Lotto? Il gioco del Lotto in Italia è gestito dal ministero dell'Economia e delle Finanze. Per giocare bisogna indicare un numero o una serie di numeri su una delle ruote. I numeri devono essere compresi tra l’1 e il 90.

stories.title: Giacomo Zanette, morto lo storico presidente della Mcz: aveva guidato la crescita del gruppo oltre i 100 milioni di fatturato
stories.summary: SACILE - Lutto nel mondo dell’imprenditoria. Due comunità si stringono attorno alla famiglia di Giacomo Zanette, spentosi ieri nel primo pomeriggio dopo lunga malattia. Lo piange Sacile, sua città natale, ma anche Fontanafredda, dove a Vigonovo ha sede la grande azienda che ha condotto per anni e della quale era ancora presidente: la storica Mcz, azienda leader nella produzione di stufe e caminetti, forte di un fatturato che nel 2024 superava abbondantemente i 100 milioni di euro. LA FAMIGLIA Una realtà fondata nel 1975 dalla madre di Giacomo Zanette che ricordava «La fondazione di Mcz è stata un’intuizione di mia madre Lidia Pizzinato. Era una donna vulcanica, piena di iniziativa.

stories.title: Quién es Nuria Fergó, invitada de hoy en 'Pasapalabra' y concursante de la primera edición de 'OT'
stories.summary: Nuria Fergó, cuyo nombre completo es Nuria Fernández Gómez, nació el 18 de abril de 1979 en Nerja, Málaga. Se dio a conocer al gran público al participar en la primera edición de Operación Triunfo en 2001, donde destacó por su voz única y carisma, abriéndole las puertas de la industria musical . Tras el concurso, lanzó su primer álbum, Brisa de esperanza (2002), que logró disco de platino, y continuó consolidando su carrera con discos como Locura (2003, oro), Paketenteres (2005), Añoranzas (2007), Tierra de nadie (2009, producida por DJ Sammy), y más recientemente Con permiso (2022), un álbum de versiones rancheras.

stories.title: Southport killer Axel Rudakubana moved to Broadmoor psychiatric hospital
stories.summary: The Southport killer Axel Rudakubana has been moved from prison to a psychiatric hospital after an assessment by psychologists, the Guardian can disclose. He was transferred to Broadmoor high-security hospital from the category A prison Belmarsh this week after it was concluded that he could not be managed safely in a prison environment, sources confirmed. People in psychiatric units such as Broadmoor are treated as patients rather than prisoners. A Ministry of Justice spokesperson said he would remain locked up and is unlikely to ever be released. The move is likely to anger many of the families of his victims, who will argue he was assessed as fit to stand trial in January 2025.

stories.title: Stabhochsprung-DM: Favorit Lita Baehre mit Salto nullo - Metzger siegt
stories.summary: Faustdicke Überraschung bei der deutschen Meisterschaft im Stabhochsprung der Männer: Beim Sieg von Marec Metzger scheiterte der haushohe Favorit Bo Kanda Lita Baehre an seiner Einstiegshöhe. Von Bettina Lenner Die Kulisse war eindrucksvoll auf dem vollbesetzten Opernplatz im Herzen von Hannover, doch die extrem schwierigen Windverhältnisse verhinderten am Donnerstag (23.07.2026) eine ebenso spektakuläre Flugshow von Deutschlands besten Stabhochspringern vor 4000 Zuschauern. Als Lita Baehre in den Wettbewerb einstieg, waren schon nur noch vier von ursprünglich 14 gestarteten Springern im Rennen.

stories.title: “GIGN” sur Netflix : une série d’action musclée mais peu inspirée
stories.summary: Voir sur Fermer Séries “GIGN” sur Netflix : une série d’action musclée mais peu inspirée Un chef de section emblématique du GIGN repousse sa retraite pour participer à une dernière mission antiterroriste. Action garantie. Pour le reste : des dialogues plats et un tout invraisemblable. S'abonner pour voir la note Dans « GIGN », Tomer Sisley, notamment connu pour son rôle dans « Largo Winch », incarne le chef de section David Caron. Photo Netflix Par Marion Michel Réservé aux abonnés Publié le 22 juillet 2026 à 18h32 C anal+ a fait B.R.I . Netflix fait son GIGN .

stories.title: À 71 ans, Christian Estrosi a gravi l’impressionnant mont Kilimandjaro en Tanzanie : sa femme Laura Tenoudji n’en revient pas !
stories.summary: À 71 ans, Christian Estrosi a gravi l’impressionnant mont Kilimandjaro en Tanzanie : sa femme Laura Tenoudji n’en revient pas ! Si les vacances d’été sont souvent synonymes de bronzette et de farniente, Christian Estrosi n’a visiblement pas décidé de suivre le mouvement. Après avoir officié en tant que maire de la ville de Nice durant de nombreuses années, l’ancien édile niçois a récemment décidé de prendre le large et de découvrir les beautés de l’Afrique. Et à désormais 71 ans, l’époux de Laura Tenoudji n’a clairement pas peur des défis extrêmes puisqu’il s’est récemment rendu en Tanzanie afin de gravir l’un des plus grands sommets au monde : le mont Kilimanjaro.

stories.title: Commando Logistic Regiment honours past and embraces future with historic name change
stories.summary: Personnel from No. 48 (Royal Marine) Commando wade through the surf and debris as they come ashore during D-Day (Picture: Royal Navy) A historic name synonymous with the Commando exploits of the Second World War and the courage displayed on D-Day has been revived as the Commando Logistics Regiment (CLR) takes on a new name. The unit will now be known as 48 Commando Support Group Royal Marines, a change celebrating the heroes of the past while embracing the new modern era of operations by the Royal Marines.

stories.title: Energía hoy en Colombia: la demanda subió a 254,57 GWh, el país mira el Fenómeno de El Niño
stories.summary: La más reciente actualización de XM muestra que el precio de bolsa nacional, correspondiente a la primera versión de liquidación del 21 de julio, registró un precio ponderado de $ 801,55 por kWh y un precio aritmético de $ 789,09 por kWh, valores que representan una disminución frente al reporte anterior.Los indicadores operativos del 22 de julio reflejan un incremento en el consumo de electricidad.

stories.title: Business rates cut for pubs, clubs and music venues in England only ‘a small move’, say critics
stories.summary: Pubs, clubs and live music venues in England will receive a 20% discount on their business rates bills as part of a £100m aid package but Andy Burnham has immediately faced calls to be more ambitious. The prime minister said the measure, aimed at supporting the high street and easing cost of living pressures, would be fully funded, including through a review of relief for businesses deemed not to make a positive contribution to communities, such as vape shops.

stories.title: Le maire RN décide de rompre les liens avec l’association culturelle de la ville
stories.summary: Article premium, Réservé aux abonnés Romain Lemoigne, maire (Rassemblement national) de La Flèche (Sarthe), vient de mettre un terme à la convention décennale liant la Ville au Carroi, association jusqu’alors en charge de la programmation culturelle. Il en a informé la présidente par courrier ce jeudi 23 juillet 2026. Romain Lemoigne annonce que la municipalité souhaite « reprendre en régie directe le pilotage de sa politique culturelle ». | ARCHIVE LE MAINE LIBRE – JEAN-CHRISTOPHE COUDERC Romain Lemoigne annonce que la municipalité souhaite « reprendre en régie directe le pilotage de sa politique culturelle ».

stories.title: Pedro Martinez - Luciano Darderi, en directo hoy: sigue el partido de Estoril Open
stories.summary: Madrid, 23 de julio de 2026. El tenista español Pedro Martinez(159) se enfrenta en Octavos de final del torneo Estoril Open al tenista italiano Luciano Darderi(21) este jueves no antes de las 19:30.
sources: bet365 - Apuestas deportivas en la red

stories.title: La humedad del 60 % dispara la sensación térmica a 63 grados en plena ola de calor
stories.summary: A brutal heatwave gripping Spain’s Valencia region pushed the heat index to 63 degrees in Sumacàrcer Thursday, as high humidity combined with 40-degree air temperatures. The state weather service reported peaks of 43.9 degrees in Bicorp, while Avamet logged heat indices above 50 degrees across multiple towns. Forecasters warn the oppressive conditions will linger through the weekend.

stories.title: Êtes-vous concerné par un remboursement des impôts ce vendredi ?
stories.summary: Nearly 12.6 million French households will receive an average tax refund of 1,057 euros between July 24 and 31. The automatic virement, labeled “REMB IMPOT REVENUS,” comes from the tax authority DGFIP and requires no action. Watch for phishing scams mimicking the refund notice.

stories.title: 13. Geburtstag von Prinz George: Beginnt jetzt die wilde Teenager-Zeit?
stories.summary: Prinz George celebrated his 13th birthday on Wednesday, marking a significant transition as he prepares to leave home for Eton College this September. The prestigious institution is known for shaping the future leaders of Britain, providing a structured environment for young boys. As the third in line to the throne, George has enjoyed a relatively normal upbringing, but his royal responsibilities are set to increase as he enters his teenage years.

stories.title: Summer Terenzi spricht erstmals über Krankheit: "Mache mich sehr verletztlich"
stories.summary: News Unterhaltung TV-Shows Galerie Born famous Bei "Born Famous - Fluch oder Segen" geben vier Promi-Kinder Einblick in ihr Leben mit berühmten Eltern. In Folge zwei sprechen Josefine Scholl, Diego Pooth, Summer Terenzi und Gloria-Sophie Burkandt über Schattenseiten und Schicksalsschläge. 23 Bilder Aktualisiert am 22.07.2026, 15:08 Uhr Teaserbild: © Joyn 1 23 In der zweiten Folge der ProSieben-Serie "Born Famous - Fluch oder Segen" wird es emotional: Josefine Scholl, Gloria-Sophie Burkandt und Summer Terenzi sprechen über frühere Schicksalsschläge und die Herausforderungen, mit denen sie noch heute zu kämpfen haben. Für Diego Pooth stehen gleich zwei wichtige Termine an.

stories.title: ¿Mensaje de Ponsarnau para Xavi Albert? "Nadie puede entrenar como Pedro Martínez"
stories.summary: Jaume Ponsarnau está siendo uno de los grandes protagonistas del Curso Nacional de Entrenadores que imparte la Federación Española de Baloncesto. El actual entrenador del Surne Bilbao y que estuvo en el banquillo del Valencia Basket durante cinco temporadas (desde 2016 a 2018 como ayudante de Txus Vidorreta y Pedro Martínez) y de 2018 a 2021 como entrenador principal, habló a los asistentes al curso sobre la necesidad de que cada entrenador encuentre su propia personalidad.

stories.title: PRONOS PARIS RMC Le pari du jour du 23 juillet - Ligue Europa
stories.summary: Cette double rencontre risque d’être serrée entre le Besiktas JK et le FC Midtjylland. Ces derniers jouaient déjà en Ligue Europa la saison dernière. Ils avaient d’ailleurs réalisé un parcours remarquable puisqu’ils avaient terminé 3ᵉ de la phase de ligue. Les Loups ont bien entamé leur préparation avec quatre victoires sur leurs cinq derniers matchs. Ils ont certainement envie de participer à nouveau à cette compétition pour la troisième année de suite. De son côté, Besiktas se doit d'obtenir une qualification en Ligue Europa après n’avoir participé à aucune compétition européenne la saison passée.

stories.title: “Listen, I’ve actually sat in a room with her and a guitar, watching those tiny hands. She made it look so effortless.” Watch Amy Winehouse stun audiences with her voice and a Stratocaster
stories.summary: Amy Winehouse, who passed away on July 23, 2011, is celebrated not only for her powerful voice but also for her skill as a guitarist. During a rehearsal for the Miller Strat Pack concert on September 23, 2004, she showcased her unique style, blending jazz chords with distinctive strumming patterns. Her musicianship continues to inspire, highlighting the depth of her artistry beyond her iconic vocals.

stories.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
stories.summary: The prime minister says no prisoners will be released until a review has been conducted. Andy Burnham has announced he is pausing a scheme which would have seen thousands of prisoners in England and Wales eligible to be released early. It came after criticism of the scheme from survivors and victims' families, including the widow of PC Andrew Harper who described the possibility of his killers' early release as "deplorable". The Sentencing Act, which was due to come into effect in September, would have seen some offenders let out at varying stages in a bid to ease prison overcrowding.

stories.title: Shels and Derry search for Conference League sparks
stories.summary: CONFERENCE LEAGUE SECOND ROUND QUALIFIER, FIRST LEG Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju, Tolka Park, 7.45pm Rijeka v Derry City, Stadion HNK Rijeka, 7.45pm WATCH Rijeka v Derry City is available to stream via the club's website. Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju is available to stream via LOITV. ONLINE Live blog on RTÉ.ie/Sport and the RTÉ News app. Shels enter Europe searching for a spark It has been a very disappointing campaign for Shelbourne, who are currently fifth in the league table, 16 points off Shamrock Rovers. They just haven't got going this year, with Joey O'Brien's June departure the inevitable conclusion to a rotten run of form.

stories.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
stories.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:57 Emily Allen and her son Matias at home in Spain An Irish woman living in Spain has described trying to live and work in Malaga at the moment as difficult due to temperatures topping 40C. Emily Allen has been living in Spain for 25 years. She told RTÉ's News at One that the problem is not just the high temperatures. "It's also the fact that here we have the Terral wind, which is basically hot wind kind of blowing in your face the minute you walk outside, it's like opening an oven door. "Also, we have what's called like Saharan calima, kind of like a haze of desert dust, which has just come over in the last hour. So, it's all hazy at the moment.

stories.title: Football gossip: Barcola, Scott, Fernandes, Odegaard, Willock, Camavinga, Disasi
stories.summary: Liverpool is poised to secure Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, who shone at the World Cup with four goal contributions. Meanwhile, Arsenal is leading the race for Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott, although he has reservations about his playing time. Additionally, Bruno Fernandes has committed to Manchester United as discussions for a new contract continue.

stories.title: ‘The Strange Architect,’ New Series by ‘Annihilation’ Author Jeff VanderMeer, Sells to Farrar, Straus and Giroux in Seven-Figure Deal (EXCLUSIVE)
stories.summary: Farrar, Straus and Giroux has secured a seven-figure deal for Jeff VanderMeer’s new four-book series, "The Strange Architect," set to debut with "How to Be Free" in winter 2029. This marks VanderMeer’s first major project since his bestselling "Southern Reach" series, which sold 1.5 million copies in the U.S. The new series will delve into the life of Arthur Bream, a man haunted by the disappearance of his daughter.

stories.title: Flash Flood threat continues for North Carolina
stories.summary: Heavy showers brought more than 6 inches of rain into High Point from Wednesday night into Thursday morning and more rain continues to fall as a slow-moving cold front drenches the state. What You Need To Know A Flood Watch is in effect for most of the state Heavy showers and thunderstorms will remain possible into the end of the week Severe storms capable of producing damaging winds remain possible Thursday featured a messy morning commute due to the heavy rain and flash flooding that kept drivers stuck on the road for much longer than expected. Multiple crashes were reported as well as some flooding on roads.

stories.title: Malisheva 2-0 Hibernian: What Gray said
stories.summary: Hibernian head coach David Gray: "I'm not going to have any sort of excuse. I'm not going to come up with any of that at all. "Everything I thought the game would be today in terms of what the opposition would do, I thought happened. As I've already said, that aggressive intensity, the transition when they scored the second goal, especially when you look at how they broke on us, everything we thought it would be. "The biggest part of it today is the fact that we were way below the levels required. "That wasn't just one or two players. To win any game of football at any level, never mind European football, you need to have a level of performance that's good enough throughout the team.

stories.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
stories.summary: Patreon is cutting 20 percent of its workforce, or about 93 employees, as part of a restructuring amid AI-driven industry changes. CEO Jack Conte cited the need to adapt operations while emphasizing AI’s role in supporting creators. The company previously trimmed 17 percent of staff in 2022.

stories.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
stories.summary: Ukraine’s ousted defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov has rejected an alternative role in President Volodymyr Zelensky’s government, demanding reinstatement. Fedorov, 35, who transformed the armed forces and led anti-corruption efforts, was removed last week amid protests. Demonstrators continue to demand his return as Zelensky reshuffles top military leadership.

stories.title: Russell proud of resilience after string of problems
stories.summary: George Russell cut his race deficit from 66 to 25 points over three European rounds but still trails Ferrari’s Antonelli by 0.5 seconds after Belgium’s engine issues cost him half his deficit. Mercedes traced the problem to a shortfall in electrical deployment on the final lap, which Russell said left him vulnerable to Lewis Hamilton’s collision in Hungary. Russell now faces a mid-season push to close the gap before the next race.

stories.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
stories.summary: Wednesday July 22, 2026 2:10 am PDT by Tim Hardwick Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are expected to feature a variable-aperture camera . The upgrade has been rumored repeatedly and would be a first for Apple's smartphone lineup, but what would it actually change for everyday users? An aperture is the opening inside a camera lens that lets in light. A natural comparison would be the pupils of your eyes, which open wider in the dark and become smaller in bright conditions. Current iPhone cameras have an opening that's fixed to the one size. To compensate for this, the iPhone adjusts other settings and uses software processing to brighten or darken the image.

stories.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
stories.summary: As major tech companies race to capitalize on a new wave of AI technology, investors wonder when financial benefits will appear. Shares of Google and Tesla plunged on Thursday as investors were spooked by the ever-increasing amounts of money being spent on artificial intelligence (AI). Google's parent company Alphabet saw its share price drop by more than 7%, while Elon Musk's electric vehicle-maker Tesla saw its stock fall 13.5%. Both reported negative free cash flow - the money retained after paying for operations and investments - in financial results on Wednesday, alongside promises to spend billions more in the months and years to come.

stories.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
stories.summary: Luka Modric, 40, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan. The Croatian midfielder, who turns 41 in September, joins Milan last summer and will continue with the club for another season. Modric expressed his excitement to return to San Siro and help Milan bounce back after a disappointing campaign.

stories.title: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
stories.summary: On the hunt for a PC case that’s loaded with features and has a unique look? Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair are selling the Corsair Frame 4500X RS for $119.99, a $70 discount from the usual price. The versatile case supports motherboards up to EATX, GPUs up to 460mm in length, and has a seamless panoramic glass window that wraps around its front and left side. The case includes three fans with reverse rotors mounted to its right side, letting the ARGB lighting shine into the case while they pull in air.

stories.title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
stories.summary: Also, the full trailer for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil features a likable everyman. Coyote vs. Acme hits theaters on August 28, 2026. Resident Evil The Resident Evil film franchise has grossed over $1.2 billion worldwide since the first film debuted in 2002, but an attempt to reboot it a few years ago floundered. Sony Pictures is trying again, this time tapping Zach Cregger—who wrote, produced, and directed last year’s Oscar-winning horror hit Weapons —for the project. The studio showed the first teaser for Cregger’s Resident Evil during CinemaCon in April and dropped the full trailer today at SDCC.

stories.title: Wolves training cancelled after Arokodare refuses to leave pitch
stories.summary: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare’s training session was cancelled after he refused to leave the pitch. The club confirmed they rejected a bid from Fiorentina while accepting an offer from Trabzonspor. Arokodare remains under contract and is expected to resume training as part of Wolves’ pre-season preparations.

stories.title: Elize: Schatten einer Frau
stories.summary: Inhalt / Kritik Unterschiedlicher könnten Elize Matsunaga ( Lorena Comparato ) und Marcos Kitano ( Henrique Kimura ) kaum sein. Denn während sie aus einfachen Verhältnissen stammt, verkehrt der Geschäftsmann in oberen Kreisen. Die Art und Weise, wie die beiden sich kennengelernt haben, ist auch nicht unbedingt sehr romantisch. Denn auch wenn Elize größere Pläne für ihr Leben hatte, ihr Geld verdient sie als Escort. Doch die beiden verstehen sich gut, Marcos ist gewillt, ihr ein besseres Leben zu bieten, wünscht sich für sie, dass sie ihren Beruf aufgibt. Tatsächlich werden die beiden ein Paar, sie heiraten sogar.

stories.title: Key Republican Senator Says He Will Support Erica Schwartz for C.D.C. Director
stories.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, who is believed to hold the deciding vote in the Senate health committee for Dr. Erica Schwartz’s confirmation, had declined for days to say whether he would back her.

stories.title: ‘Breaking Bad’ Star Giancarlo Esposito Signs With UTA for Representation (EXCLUSIVE)
stories.summary: Giancarlo Esposito has signed with United Talent Agency for representation. The Emmy-nominated actor will star in multiple upcoming projects, including films opening October 16 and Netflix’s “The Gentlemen” Season 2. He also voices the Cat in the Hat in Universal’s animated adaptation.
entities: The Only Living Pickpocket in New York

stories.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo
stories.summary: There are a million people displaced by violence in the epicenter. They live in dangerous conditions and are fighting the virus with very little clean water.

stories.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings With Iraq
stories.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

stories.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
stories.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

stories.title: House Again Rebukes Trump on Iran War Powers Vote
stories.summary: For the second time, a few House Republicans joined Democrats to back a measure calling on the president to seek authorization for the war.

stories.title: The Tate Brothers Are Losing Right-Wing Allies After Their Arrest
stories.summary: After Andrew and Tristan Tate, prominent leaders of the so-called manosphere, were arrested in Miami, many of their onetime allies on the American right pulled back support.

stories.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
stories.summary: I was once visiting Massachusetts in the US and forgot to take my card into the gas station before filling up ( ‘A guy did a runner in a Jaguar’: the petrol theft scandal – and the garage owner struggling to stop it, 21 July ). After some loudspeaker remonstration, I took my card in, apologising that I’d forgotten as we don’t do that in the UK. The owner almost fell on the floor laughing. “How do you stop people stealing gas?” he asked. “We don’t,” I replied. Further merriment ensued. Sadly, it’s time we did start not releasing pumps until we have cash or a card deposit on hand.

stories.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
stories.summary: Once, a tub of popcorn was just a tub of popcorn. Now, ‘collectible concession vessels’ could make one chain more than $100 million.

stories.title: BBC Inside Science
stories.summary: US Secretary of Defence Pete Hegseth announced on 23 July 2026 that the military will screen personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, offering voluntary hormone replacement therapy to those with low levels. The move aims to maintain a “healthy, capable, and decisively dominant fighting force.” Further details on implementation and outcomes will follow.

stories.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
stories.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank to a test building on May 15. The tank will fuel the SLS rocket’s core stage for future missions. Next, it undergoes final checks before integration.

stories.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
stories.summary: A groundbreaking study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by 3% for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise levels. Published in Jama Neurology, the research highlights potential biological links, including stress and disrupted sleep, and suggests that having a quieter home environment may help mitigate this risk. The study tracked participants over 18 years, marking it as the largest of its kind.

stories.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
stories.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas are 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections than those in wealthier regions, new NHS data shows. In 2024-25, 1,941 per 100,000 children from the most deprived areas were admitted compared to 1,380 per 100,000 in the least deprived. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key factors driving the disparity.

offbeat.title: Woman, 20s, arrested after bomb disposal team attend incident in Co Monaghan
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 10:20 An Garda Síochána requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces team (File image) A woman has been arrested after a Defence Forces Explosive Ordnance Disposal (EOD) team was called to assist gardaí at an incident in Co Monaghan. The incident took place on a road near Carrickmacross yesterday. In a statement, gardaí confirmed that they stopped a vehicle travelling on the N2 south of Carrickmacross at around 3pm yesterday afternoon. Following the stop, An Garda Síochána said it requested the assistance of the Irish Defence Forces EOD team.

offbeat.title: Tour de France 2026: Richard Carapaz wins stage 18
offbeat.summary: Ecuador's Richard Carapaz won stage 18 of the Tour de France following a commanding breakaway. The EF Education-Easypost rider brilliantly accelerated away from his rivals with intuitive and canny riding, finishing 45 seconds ahead of Switzerland's Mauro Schmid of Jayco-Alula and Matteo Jorgenson of Visma-Lease a Bike. Meanwhile, sickness appears to be making its way through overall leader Tadej Pogacar's UAE Team Emirates-XRG squad after key domestique Brandon McNulty abandoned the race mid-stage.

offbeat.title: Judith Rakers filmt am Strand – und wird vom Vater ermahnt
offbeat.summary: "Weil die Nudisten dann Theater machen" Judith Rakers verärgert Vater mit Strand-Video 20.07.2026 Lesedauer: 2 Min. Moderatorin Judith Rakers hat ein Video vom Strand geteilt. Ihr Vater war mit der Aufnahme nicht einverstanden – und ermahnte sie vor laufender Kamera. Judith Rakers war mit ihrem Vater Hermann Rakers gemeinsam auf der Insel Rügen. In einem kurzen Instagram-Clip lässt die ehemalige "Tagesschau"-Sprecherin ihre Fans an einer lustigen Szene teilhaben: Die 50-Jährige wird von ihrem Vater vor laufender Kamera zurechtgewiesen. In dem Video geht Hermann Rakers auf einem Fußweg zum Strand, im Hintergrund sind Gebäude zu sehen. "Du darfst hier nicht fotografieren, Judith.

offbeat.title: Lotto e Superenalotto, l’estrazione di oggi 23 luglio: tutti i numeri vincenti
offbeat.summary: Introduzione Le estrazioni dei numeri dei giochi del Lotto, Superenalotto e 10eLotto si tengono ogni martedì, giovedì, venerdì e sabato. Per tentare la fortuna, è possibile giocare fino alle ore 19.30 del giorno del concorso. Le estrazioni dei numeri, poi, iniziano dalle ore 20. Ecco i numeri vincenti di oggi, giovedì 23 luglio, l'ammontare del jackpot e i numeri ritardatari. Sceglici su: Quello che devi sapere Come funziona il Lotto? Il gioco del Lotto in Italia è gestito dal ministero dell'Economia e delle Finanze. Per giocare bisogna indicare un numero o una serie di numeri su una delle ruote. I numeri devono essere compresi tra l’1 e il 90.

offbeat.title: Giacomo Zanette, morto lo storico presidente della Mcz: aveva guidato la crescita del gruppo oltre i 100 milioni di fatturato
offbeat.summary: SACILE - Lutto nel mondo dell’imprenditoria. Due comunità si stringono attorno alla famiglia di Giacomo Zanette, spentosi ieri nel primo pomeriggio dopo lunga malattia. Lo piange Sacile, sua città natale, ma anche Fontanafredda, dove a Vigonovo ha sede la grande azienda che ha condotto per anni e della quale era ancora presidente: la storica Mcz, azienda leader nella produzione di stufe e caminetti, forte di un fatturato che nel 2024 superava abbondantemente i 100 milioni di euro. LA FAMIGLIA Una realtà fondata nel 1975 dalla madre di Giacomo Zanette che ricordava «La fondazione di Mcz è stata un’intuizione di mia madre Lidia Pizzinato. Era una donna vulcanica, piena di iniziativa.

offbeat.title: Quién es Nuria Fergó, invitada de hoy en 'Pasapalabra' y concursante de la primera edición de 'OT'
offbeat.summary: Nuria Fergó, cuyo nombre completo es Nuria Fernández Gómez, nació el 18 de abril de 1979 en Nerja, Málaga. Se dio a conocer al gran público al participar en la primera edición de Operación Triunfo en 2001, donde destacó por su voz única y carisma, abriéndole las puertas de la industria musical . Tras el concurso, lanzó su primer álbum, Brisa de esperanza (2002), que logró disco de platino, y continuó consolidando su carrera con discos como Locura (2003, oro), Paketenteres (2005), Añoranzas (2007), Tierra de nadie (2009, producida por DJ Sammy), y más recientemente Con permiso (2022), un álbum de versiones rancheras.

offbeat.title: Southport killer Axel Rudakubana moved to Broadmoor psychiatric hospital
offbeat.summary: The Southport killer Axel Rudakubana has been moved from prison to a psychiatric hospital after an assessment by psychologists, the Guardian can disclose. He was transferred to Broadmoor high-security hospital from the category A prison Belmarsh this week after it was concluded that he could not be managed safely in a prison environment, sources confirmed. People in psychiatric units such as Broadmoor are treated as patients rather than prisoners. A Ministry of Justice spokesperson said he would remain locked up and is unlikely to ever be released. The move is likely to anger many of the families of his victims, who will argue he was assessed as fit to stand trial in January 2025.

offbeat.title: Stabhochsprung-DM: Favorit Lita Baehre mit Salto nullo - Metzger siegt
offbeat.summary: Faustdicke Überraschung bei der deutschen Meisterschaft im Stabhochsprung der Männer: Beim Sieg von Marec Metzger scheiterte der haushohe Favorit Bo Kanda Lita Baehre an seiner Einstiegshöhe. Von Bettina Lenner Die Kulisse war eindrucksvoll auf dem vollbesetzten Opernplatz im Herzen von Hannover, doch die extrem schwierigen Windverhältnisse verhinderten am Donnerstag (23.07.2026) eine ebenso spektakuläre Flugshow von Deutschlands besten Stabhochspringern vor 4000 Zuschauern. Als Lita Baehre in den Wettbewerb einstieg, waren schon nur noch vier von ursprünglich 14 gestarteten Springern im Rennen.

offbeat.title: “GIGN” sur Netflix : une série d’action musclée mais peu inspirée
offbeat.summary: Voir sur Fermer Séries “GIGN” sur Netflix : une série d’action musclée mais peu inspirée Un chef de section emblématique du GIGN repousse sa retraite pour participer à une dernière mission antiterroriste. Action garantie. Pour le reste : des dialogues plats et un tout invraisemblable. S'abonner pour voir la note Dans « GIGN », Tomer Sisley, notamment connu pour son rôle dans « Largo Winch », incarne le chef de section David Caron. Photo Netflix Par Marion Michel Réservé aux abonnés Publié le 22 juillet 2026 à 18h32 C anal+ a fait B.R.I . Netflix fait son GIGN .

offbeat.title: À 71 ans, Christian Estrosi a gravi l’impressionnant mont Kilimandjaro en Tanzanie : sa femme Laura Tenoudji n’en revient pas !
offbeat.summary: À 71 ans, Christian Estrosi a gravi l’impressionnant mont Kilimandjaro en Tanzanie : sa femme Laura Tenoudji n’en revient pas ! Si les vacances d’été sont souvent synonymes de bronzette et de farniente, Christian Estrosi n’a visiblement pas décidé de suivre le mouvement. Après avoir officié en tant que maire de la ville de Nice durant de nombreuses années, l’ancien édile niçois a récemment décidé de prendre le large et de découvrir les beautés de l’Afrique. Et à désormais 71 ans, l’époux de Laura Tenoudji n’a clairement pas peur des défis extrêmes puisqu’il s’est récemment rendu en Tanzanie afin de gravir l’un des plus grands sommets au monde : le mont Kilimanjaro.

offbeat.title: Commando Logistic Regiment honours past and embraces future with historic name change
offbeat.summary: Personnel from No. 48 (Royal Marine) Commando wade through the surf and debris as they come ashore during D-Day (Picture: Royal Navy) A historic name synonymous with the Commando exploits of the Second World War and the courage displayed on D-Day has been revived as the Commando Logistics Regiment (CLR) takes on a new name. The unit will now be known as 48 Commando Support Group Royal Marines, a change celebrating the heroes of the past while embracing the new modern era of operations by the Royal Marines.

offbeat.title: Energía hoy en Colombia: la demanda subió a 254,57 GWh, el país mira el Fenómeno de El Niño
offbeat.summary: La más reciente actualización de XM muestra que el precio de bolsa nacional, correspondiente a la primera versión de liquidación del 21 de julio, registró un precio ponderado de $ 801,55 por kWh y un precio aritmético de $ 789,09 por kWh, valores que representan una disminución frente al reporte anterior.Los indicadores operativos del 22 de julio reflejan un incremento en el consumo de electricidad.

offbeat.title: Business rates cut for pubs, clubs and music venues in England only ‘a small move’, say critics
offbeat.summary: Pubs, clubs and live music venues in England will receive a 20% discount on their business rates bills as part of a £100m aid package but Andy Burnham has immediately faced calls to be more ambitious. The prime minister said the measure, aimed at supporting the high street and easing cost of living pressures, would be fully funded, including through a review of relief for businesses deemed not to make a positive contribution to communities, such as vape shops.

offbeat.title: Le maire RN décide de rompre les liens avec l’association culturelle de la ville
offbeat.summary: Article premium, Réservé aux abonnés Romain Lemoigne, maire (Rassemblement national) de La Flèche (Sarthe), vient de mettre un terme à la convention décennale liant la Ville au Carroi, association jusqu’alors en charge de la programmation culturelle. Il en a informé la présidente par courrier ce jeudi 23 juillet 2026. Romain Lemoigne annonce que la municipalité souhaite « reprendre en régie directe le pilotage de sa politique culturelle ». | ARCHIVE LE MAINE LIBRE – JEAN-CHRISTOPHE COUDERC Romain Lemoigne annonce que la municipalité souhaite « reprendre en régie directe le pilotage de sa politique culturelle ».

offbeat.title: Pedro Martinez - Luciano Darderi, en directo hoy: sigue el partido de Estoril Open
offbeat.summary: Madrid, 23 de julio de 2026. El tenista español Pedro Martinez(159) se enfrenta en Octavos de final del torneo Estoril Open al tenista italiano Luciano Darderi(21) este jueves no antes de las 19:30.
sources: bet365 - Apuestas deportivas en la red

offbeat.title: La humedad del 60 % dispara la sensación térmica a 63 grados en plena ola de calor
offbeat.summary: A brutal heatwave gripping Spain’s Valencia region pushed the heat index to 63 degrees in Sumacàrcer Thursday, as high humidity combined with 40-degree air temperatures. The state weather service reported peaks of 43.9 degrees in Bicorp, while Avamet logged heat indices above 50 degrees across multiple towns. Forecasters warn the oppressive conditions will linger through the weekend.

offbeat.title: Êtes-vous concerné par un remboursement des impôts ce vendredi ?
offbeat.summary: Nearly 12.6 million French households will receive an average tax refund of 1,057 euros between July 24 and 31. The automatic virement, labeled “REMB IMPOT REVENUS,” comes from the tax authority DGFIP and requires no action. Watch for phishing scams mimicking the refund notice.

offbeat.title: 13. Geburtstag von Prinz George: Beginnt jetzt die wilde Teenager-Zeit?
offbeat.summary: Prinz George celebrated his 13th birthday on Wednesday, marking a significant transition as he prepares to leave home for Eton College this September. The prestigious institution is known for shaping the future leaders of Britain, providing a structured environment for young boys. As the third in line to the throne, George has enjoyed a relatively normal upbringing, but his royal responsibilities are set to increase as he enters his teenage years.

offbeat.title: Summer Terenzi spricht erstmals über Krankheit: "Mache mich sehr verletztlich"
offbeat.summary: News Unterhaltung TV-Shows Galerie Born famous Bei "Born Famous - Fluch oder Segen" geben vier Promi-Kinder Einblick in ihr Leben mit berühmten Eltern. In Folge zwei sprechen Josefine Scholl, Diego Pooth, Summer Terenzi und Gloria-Sophie Burkandt über Schattenseiten und Schicksalsschläge. 23 Bilder Aktualisiert am 22.07.2026, 15:08 Uhr Teaserbild: © Joyn 1 23 In der zweiten Folge der ProSieben-Serie "Born Famous - Fluch oder Segen" wird es emotional: Josefine Scholl, Gloria-Sophie Burkandt und Summer Terenzi sprechen über frühere Schicksalsschläge und die Herausforderungen, mit denen sie noch heute zu kämpfen haben. Für Diego Pooth stehen gleich zwei wichtige Termine an.

offbeat.title: ¿Mensaje de Ponsarnau para Xavi Albert? "Nadie puede entrenar como Pedro Martínez"
offbeat.summary: Jaume Ponsarnau está siendo uno de los grandes protagonistas del Curso Nacional de Entrenadores que imparte la Federación Española de Baloncesto. El actual entrenador del Surne Bilbao y que estuvo en el banquillo del Valencia Basket durante cinco temporadas (desde 2016 a 2018 como ayudante de Txus Vidorreta y Pedro Martínez) y de 2018 a 2021 como entrenador principal, habló a los asistentes al curso sobre la necesidad de que cada entrenador encuentre su propia personalidad.

offbeat.title: PRONOS PARIS RMC Le pari du jour du 23 juillet - Ligue Europa
offbeat.summary: Cette double rencontre risque d’être serrée entre le Besiktas JK et le FC Midtjylland. Ces derniers jouaient déjà en Ligue Europa la saison dernière. Ils avaient d’ailleurs réalisé un parcours remarquable puisqu’ils avaient terminé 3ᵉ de la phase de ligue. Les Loups ont bien entamé leur préparation avec quatre victoires sur leurs cinq derniers matchs. Ils ont certainement envie de participer à nouveau à cette compétition pour la troisième année de suite. De son côté, Besiktas se doit d'obtenir une qualification en Ligue Europa après n’avoir participé à aucune compétition européenne la saison passée.

offbeat.title: “Listen, I’ve actually sat in a room with her and a guitar, watching those tiny hands. She made it look so effortless.” Watch Amy Winehouse stun audiences with her voice and a Stratocaster
offbeat.summary: Amy Winehouse, who passed away on July 23, 2011, is celebrated not only for her powerful voice but also for her skill as a guitarist. During a rehearsal for the Miller Strat Pack concert on September 23, 2004, she showcased her unique style, blending jazz chords with distinctive strumming patterns. Her musicianship continues to inspire, highlighting the depth of her artistry beyond her iconic vocals.

offbeat.title: Shels and Derry search for Conference League sparks
offbeat.summary: CONFERENCE LEAGUE SECOND ROUND QUALIFIER, FIRST LEG Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju, Tolka Park, 7.45pm Rijeka v Derry City, Stadion HNK Rijeka, 7.45pm WATCH Rijeka v Derry City is available to stream via the club's website. Shelbourne v Nomme Kalju is available to stream via LOITV. ONLINE Live blog on RTÉ.ie/Sport and the RTÉ News app. Shels enter Europe searching for a spark It has been a very disappointing campaign for Shelbourne, who are currently fifth in the league table, 16 points off Shamrock Rovers. They just haven't got going this year, with Joey O'Brien's June departure the inevitable conclusion to a rotten run of form.

offbeat.title: Walking outside in Malaga in 40C 'like opening an oven door'
offbeat.summary: Updated / Thursday, 23 Jul 2026 16:57 Emily Allen and her son Matias at home in Spain An Irish woman living in Spain has described trying to live and work in Malaga at the moment as difficult due to temperatures topping 40C. Emily Allen has been living in Spain for 25 years. She told RTÉ's News at One that the problem is not just the high temperatures. "It's also the fact that here we have the Terral wind, which is basically hot wind kind of blowing in your face the minute you walk outside, it's like opening an oven door. "Also, we have what's called like Saharan calima, kind of like a haze of desert dust, which has just come over in the last hour. So, it's all hazy at the moment.

offbeat.title: Football gossip: Barcola, Scott, Fernandes, Odegaard, Willock, Camavinga, Disasi
offbeat.summary: Liverpool is poised to secure Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, who shone at the World Cup with four goal contributions. Meanwhile, Arsenal is leading the race for Bournemouth midfielder Alex Scott, although he has reservations about his playing time. Additionally, Bruno Fernandes has committed to Manchester United as discussions for a new contract continue.

offbeat.title: Flash Flood threat continues for North Carolina
offbeat.summary: Heavy showers brought more than 6 inches of rain into High Point from Wednesday night into Thursday morning and more rain continues to fall as a slow-moving cold front drenches the state. What You Need To Know A Flood Watch is in effect for most of the state Heavy showers and thunderstorms will remain possible into the end of the week Severe storms capable of producing damaging winds remain possible Thursday featured a messy morning commute due to the heavy rain and flash flooding that kept drivers stuck on the road for much longer than expected. Multiple crashes were reported as well as some flooding on roads.

offbeat.title: Malisheva 2-0 Hibernian: What Gray said
offbeat.summary: Hibernian head coach David Gray: "I'm not going to have any sort of excuse. I'm not going to come up with any of that at all. "Everything I thought the game would be today in terms of what the opposition would do, I thought happened. As I've already said, that aggressive intensity, the transition when they scored the second goal, especially when you look at how they broke on us, everything we thought it would be. "The biggest part of it today is the fact that we were way below the levels required. "That wasn't just one or two players. To win any game of football at any level, never mind European football, you need to have a level of performance that's good enough throughout the team.

offbeat.title: Ukraine's ousted defence minister insists on being reinstated
offbeat.summary: Ukraine’s ousted defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov has rejected an alternative role in President Volodymyr Zelensky’s government, demanding reinstatement. Fedorov, 35, who transformed the armed forces and led anti-corruption efforts, was removed last week amid protests. Demonstrators continue to demand his return as Zelensky reshuffles top military leadership.

offbeat.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
offbeat.summary: Wednesday July 22, 2026 2:10 am PDT by Tim Hardwick Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max are expected to feature a variable-aperture camera . The upgrade has been rumored repeatedly and would be a first for Apple's smartphone lineup, but what would it actually change for everyday users? An aperture is the opening inside a camera lens that lets in light. A natural comparison would be the pupils of your eyes, which open wider in the dark and become smaller in bright conditions. Current iPhone cameras have an opening that's fixed to the one size. To compensate for this, the iPhone adjusts other settings and uses software processing to brighten or darken the image.

offbeat.title: Final Coyote vs. Acme trailer drops at SDCC
offbeat.summary: Also, the full trailer for Zach Cregger's Resident Evil features a likable everyman. Coyote vs. Acme hits theaters on August 28, 2026. Resident Evil The Resident Evil film franchise has grossed over $1.2 billion worldwide since the first film debuted in 2002, but an attempt to reboot it a few years ago floundered. Sony Pictures is trying again, this time tapping Zach Cregger—who wrote, produced, and directed last year’s Oscar-winning horror hit Weapons —for the project. The studio showed the first teaser for Cregger’s Resident Evil during CinemaCon in April and dropped the full trailer today at SDCC.

offbeat.title: Elize: Schatten einer Frau
offbeat.summary: Inhalt / Kritik Unterschiedlicher könnten Elize Matsunaga ( Lorena Comparato ) und Marcos Kitano ( Henrique Kimura ) kaum sein. Denn während sie aus einfachen Verhältnissen stammt, verkehrt der Geschäftsmann in oberen Kreisen. Die Art und Weise, wie die beiden sich kennengelernt haben, ist auch nicht unbedingt sehr romantisch. Denn auch wenn Elize größere Pläne für ihr Leben hatte, ihr Geld verdient sie als Escort. Doch die beiden verstehen sich gut, Marcos ist gewillt, ihr ein besseres Leben zu bieten, wünscht sich für sie, dass sie ihren Beruf aufgibt. Tatsächlich werden die beiden ein Paar, sie heiraten sogar.

politics.title: Burnham pauses early prison release scheme
politics.summary: The prime minister says no prisoners will be released until a review has been conducted. Andy Burnham has announced he is pausing a scheme which would have seen thousands of prisoners in England and Wales eligible to be released early. It came after criticism of the scheme from survivors and victims' families, including the widow of PC Andrew Harper who described the possibility of his killers' early release as "deplorable". The Sentencing Act, which was due to come into effect in September, would have seen some offenders let out at varying stages in a bid to ease prison overcrowding.

politics.title: Key Republican Senator Says He Will Support Erica Schwartz for C.D.C. Director
politics.summary: Senator Bill Cassidy, who is believed to hold the deciding vote in the Senate health committee for Dr. Erica Schwartz’s confirmation, had declined for days to say whether he would back her.

politics.title: House Again Rebukes Trump on Iran War Powers Vote
politics.summary: For the second time, a few House Republicans joined Democrats to back a measure calling on the president to seek authorization for the war.

entertainment.title: ‘The Strange Architect,’ New Series by ‘Annihilation’ Author Jeff VanderMeer, Sells to Farrar, Straus and Giroux in Seven-Figure Deal (EXCLUSIVE)
entertainment.summary: Farrar, Straus and Giroux has secured a seven-figure deal for Jeff VanderMeer’s new four-book series, "The Strange Architect," set to debut with "How to Be Free" in winter 2029. This marks VanderMeer’s first major project since his bestselling "Southern Reach" series, which sold 1.5 million copies in the U.S. The new series will delve into the life of Arthur Bream, a man haunted by the disappearance of his daughter.

entertainment.title: ‘Breaking Bad’ Star Giancarlo Esposito Signs With UTA for Representation (EXCLUSIVE)
entertainment.summary: Giancarlo Esposito has signed with United Talent Agency for representation. The Emmy-nominated actor will star in multiple upcoming projects, including films opening October 16 and Netflix’s “The Gentlemen” Season 2. He also voices the Cat in the Hat in Universal’s animated adaptation.
entities: The Only Living Pickpocket in New York

tech.title: Patreon is laying off 20 percent of workers
tech.summary: Patreon is cutting 20 percent of its workforce, or about 93 employees, as part of a restructuring amid AI-driven industry changes. CEO Jack Conte cited the need to adapt operations while emphasizing AI’s role in supporting creators. The company previously trimmed 17 percent of staff in 2022.

tech.title: Corsair’s PC case with a panoramic glass design is $70 off
tech.summary: On the hunt for a PC case that’s loaded with features and has a unique look? Amazon, Best Buy, and Corsair are selling the Corsair Frame 4500X RS for $119.99, a $70 discount from the usual price. The versatile case supports motherboards up to EATX, GPUs up to 460mm in length, and has a seamless panoramic glass window that wraps around its front and left side. The case includes three fans with reverse rotors mounted to its right side, letting the ARGB lighting shine into the case while they pull in air.

sports.title: Russell proud of resilience after string of problems
sports.summary: George Russell cut his race deficit from 66 to 25 points over three European rounds but still trails Ferrari’s Antonelli by 0.5 seconds after Belgium’s engine issues cost him half his deficit. Mercedes traced the problem to a shortfall in electrical deployment on the final lap, which Russell said left him vulnerable to Lewis Hamilton’s collision in Hungary. Russell now faces a mid-season push to close the gap before the next race.

sports.title: Modric, 40, signs new AC Milan deal
sports.summary: Luka Modric, 40, has signed a one-year contract extension with AC Milan. The Croatian midfielder, who turns 41 in September, joins Milan last summer and will continue with the club for another season. Modric expressed his excitement to return to San Siro and help Milan bounce back after a disappointing campaign.

sports.title: Wolves training cancelled after Arokodare refuses to leave pitch
sports.summary: Wolves striker Tolu Arokodare’s training session was cancelled after he refused to leave the pitch. The club confirmed they rejected a bid from Fiorentina while accepting an offer from Trabzonspor. Arokodare remains under contract and is expected to resume training as part of Wolves’ pre-season preparations.

crisis.title: Google and Tesla shares plunge as AI spending rattles markets
crisis.summary: As major tech companies race to capitalize on a new wave of AI technology, investors wonder when financial benefits will appear. Shares of Google and Tesla plunged on Thursday as investors were spooked by the ever-increasing amounts of money being spent on artificial intelligence (AI). Google's parent company Alphabet saw its share price drop by more than 7%, while Elon Musk's electric vehicle-maker Tesla saw its stock fall 13.5%. Both reported negative free cash flow - the money retained after paying for operations and investments - in financial results on Wednesday, alongside promises to spend billions more in the months and years to come.

crisis.title: ‘Odyssey’ Popcorn Buckets Help Fuel a $100 Million Market
crisis.summary: Once, a tub of popcorn was just a tub of popcorn. Now, ‘collectible concession vessels’ could make one chain more than $100 million.

breaking.title: ‘We Will All Die From Ebola Here’: Virus Stalks Crowded Camps in Congo
breaking.summary: There are a million people displaced by violence in the epicenter. They live in dangerous conditions and are fighting the virus with very little clean water.

breaking.title: Chaos Breaks Out at Border Crossings With Iraq
breaking.summary: Videos verified by The New York Times show border crossings in southern Iraq becoming the latest target in the hostilities in the Middle East.

breaking.title: The Tate Brothers Are Losing Right-Wing Allies After Their Arrest
breaking.summary: After Andrew and Tristan Tate, prominent leaders of the so-called manosphere, were arrested in Miami, many of their onetime allies on the American right pulled back support.

facts.title: A Peptide Showdown: F.D.A. Scientists May Clash With R.F.K.’s Agenda
facts.summary: Agency scientists are advising against allowing widespread use of several peptide injections. Robert F. Kennedy Jr., the health secretary, has said people should be free to experiment.

facts.title: BBC Inside Science
facts.summary: US Secretary of Defence Pete Hegseth announced on 23 July 2026 that the military will screen personnel aged 30 and older for testosterone deficiency, offering voluntary hormone replacement therapy to those with low levels. The move aims to maintain a “healthy, capable, and decisively dominant fighting force.” Further details on implementation and outcomes will follow.

facts.title: Crews Move Artemis IV Liquid Hydrogen Tank
facts.summary: Crews at NASA’s Michoud Assembly Facility in New Orleans moved the 130-foot Artemis IV liquid hydrogen tank to a test building on May 15. The tank will fuel the SLS rocket’s core stage for future missions. Next, it undergoes final checks before integration.

health.title: The only way to stop petrol pump thieves | Brief letters
health.summary: I was once visiting Massachusetts in the US and forgot to take my card into the gas station before filling up ( ‘A guy did a runner in a Jaguar’: the petrol theft scandal – and the garage owner struggling to stop it, 21 July ). After some loudspeaker remonstration, I took my card in, apologising that I’d forgotten as we don’t do that in the UK. The owner almost fell on the floor laughing. “How do you stop people stealing gas?” he asked. “We don’t,” I replied. Further merriment ensued. Sadly, it’s time we did start not releasing pumps until we have cash or a card deposit on hand.

health.title: Risk of Parkinson’s disease may increase with prolonged exposure to road traffic noise
health.summary: A groundbreaking study involving 3.1 million Danish participants has found that long-term exposure to road traffic noise increases the risk of Parkinson’s disease by 3% for every 11.5 decibel rise in noise levels. Published in Jama Neurology, the research highlights potential biological links, including stress and disrupted sleep, and suggests that having a quieter home environment may help mitigate this risk. The study tracked participants over 18 years, marking it as the largest of its kind.

health.title: Poorest children in England 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections
health.summary: Children in England’s poorest areas are 40% more likely to be hospitalised for lung infections than those in wealthier regions, new NHS data shows. In 2024-25, 1,941 per 100,000 children from the most deprived areas were admitted compared to 1,380 per 100,000 in the least deprived. Experts warn air pollution and deprivation are key factors driving the disparity.
